channel.title: Politics on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Politics on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: Trump has given North Korea “the greatest gift ever”
item.description:
Forget the sensationalist headline, and listen to the podcast episode. Interesting to get the perspective of people with more background then ourselves.

Trump has given North Korea “the greatest gift ever”
